title: COPY INTO does not work correctly with backslashes in VARCHARs
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t (x String, y String NOT NULL);
INSERT INTO t (x, y) VALUES (NULL, 'another valid');
SELECT * FROM t WHERE x IS NOT NULL;
INSERT INTO t (x, y) SELECT '\\' AS x, 'test' AS y;
key_bug_features: COPY INTO fails with backslashes in VARCHARs
